# Progress Log
# Auto-generated by ralph.sh — append-only learnings from each iteration.
# Each fresh iteration reads this first to avoid repeating past mistakes.
# Delete the example entry below before starting your own loop.

## Iteration 1 (example — delete me)

- Story: [story title]
- [What was implemented]
- Key learning: [gotcha the next iteration should know]
- Tests passing: [X/Y]
- Finished: [timestamp]
